== Notes for [[Item:Q106665|Q106665]] ==

ID: I180887

Name: Na'im II al-Lakhmi 1

Sex: M

Birth: ABT 730 1

Event: Relationship (J,M&L) 40th Great-grandparent 1

Father: Na'im al-Lakhmi b: ABT 710

Marriage 1 Spouse Unknown

Children

Itlaf ibn Na'im al-Lakhmi b: ABT 754 in Arabia

Sources:

Title: loren.ged

Repository:

Media: Other

Text: Date of Import: Apr 12, 2006

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000004533831103

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
